description.en: The name of the header (the portion of the field before the ‘:’). This is exactly the value passed in the header_factory call for name; that is, case is preserved.

excerpt.es: The name of the header (the portion of the field before the ‘:’). This is exactly the value passed in the header_factory call for name; that is, case is preserved.
